title: coleus linearifolius
intro: Coleus linearifolius is a plant species belonging to the Lamiaceae family, commonly known as the Coleus plant. It is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Coleus linearifolius include the reduction of fever, relief from headaches, and the treatment of skin conditions such as eczema and acne. The plant can be prepared as a decoction, infusion, or tincture for herbal use, and it is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its therapeutic effects.
